channel.title: Projects on Muhammad Qasim (qasimio)
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Muhammad Qasim (qasimio)

item.title: DevShelf — Search Engine from First Principles (Java)
item.description: A first-principles search engine demonstrating offline indexing, positional inverted indices, and hybrid ranking.

item.title: MQNotebook — Enterprise-Grade RAG System
item.description: A local-first RAG system engineered to handle scanned PDFs, complex spreadsheets, and slide decks with precision retrieval and reranking.

item.title: BabyGPT: Generative Text Engine
item.description: A character-level Generative AI model built from scratch using Dual-Stack LSTMs and custom temperature sampling.
